dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7788 IH: Maryland Whole Watershed Program Federal Partnership Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Elfreth (for herself, Mr. Olszewski, Mr. Mfume, and Mr. Raskin) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To authorize the Chesapeake Bay Program Office to serve as a member of certain State watershed programs, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Maryland Whole Watershed Program Federal Partnership Act.

subsection.text: The Chesapeake Bay Program Office shall serve as an advisory member of the State Management Team for the Maryland Whole Watershed Program and any other substantially similar program in a State.
In carrying out subsection (a), the Chesapeake Bay Program Office is authorized to—

paragraph.text: coordinate with State and local governments and Federal agencies; and
provide technical assistance and financial resources for projects carried out in the Chesapeake Bay watershed.

subsection.text: In this section, the term Chesapeake Bay Program Office means the office established and maintained pursuant to section 117(b) of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act (33 U.S.C. 1267(b)).
